title: Mr Muscle Platinum Window & Glass Cleaner Spray, Pack of 6 (6 x 750ml)
features: Window cleaner with added vinegar for effective cleaning of all your glass and window surfaces
Cuts through tough grease and grime
Leaves all glass surfaces smear free
For quick and easy glass surface cleaning
description: Product Description Mr Muscle Platinum Window and Glass Cleaner with Vinegar Power is formulated to defeat tough glass messes. Grease and grime can be tough, but this vinegar-fortified spray cleaner is tougher. To keep your windows and other glass surfaces sparkling, simply turn the nozzle to SPRAY position and spray with full trigger strokes on the desired cleaning area. Then wipe the surface with kitchen paper or a soft dry cloth for a streak-free shine. Mr Muscle Platinum Window and Glass Cleaner eliminates smudges and smears and gives surfaces a streak-free shine, allowing you to clean less and live more. Ingredients Water, Butoxypropanol, 2-Hexoxyethanol, Propylene Glycol, Sodium C14-17 Sec-Alkyl Sulfonate, Sodium Dodecylbenzene Sulfonate, Acetic Acid, Lactic Acid, Fragrance, Liquitint Yellow LP Dye, Liquitint Aquamarine Dye Ingredients Water, Butoxypropanol, 2-Hexoxyethanol, Propylene Glycol, Sodium C14-17 Sec-Alkyl Sulfonate, Sodium Dodecylbenzene Sulfonate, Acetic Acid, Lactic Acid, Fragrance, Liquitint® Yellow LP Dye, Liquitint® Aquamarine Dye
